name: ruby-concurrent
title: ruby-concurrent
description:
Modern concurrency tools for Ruby
Concurrent Ruby provides modern concurrency tools including agents, futures,
promises, thread pools, actors, supervisors, and more. Inspired by Erlang,
Clojure, Go, JavaScript, actors, and classic concurrency patterns.
.
This package also includes experimental edge features via the
concurrent-ruby-edge gem and the Java native extension for JRuby.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-concurrent because Modern concurrency tools for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-concurrent as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-concurrent with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-concurrent --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
